name: Chicken and Tuna Sauce Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chicken, celery, onion, red bell pepper, and parsley in a bowl.
2. Mix the tuna sauce and mayonnaise together until smooth.
3. Toss all ingredients together except the lettuce.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 2 to 4 hours, tossing occasionally while chilling.
5. Serve on lettuce leaves. Serves 8 as an entree salad.
